Sentences: Nindali ndia ku isoko inyanga yakwe.
Ndikho office but nditsa okhucha khaya bwangu.
Twabasaba mulonde empapula tsenyu khushikalo shia reception.
Abalimi bakafunila obulayi khulwa puloguramu ya serikali.
Esibuli shia khoteli shikhalondwa buli mwaka.
Abakozi balondokhana nende amateeko ga kampuni.
Omwana ni witsa wa buli muntu.
Radio Mulembe yakhola interview nende omwimbi.
Omwoyo kwanje kukhurira khulwa eshinyasio esho.
